chunks.en: I usually get to work at nine o'clock.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい9時に職場に着きます。

chunks.en: I usually take the train to the office.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい電車でオフィスに行きます。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is turn on my computer.
chunks.ja: まず最初にすることはパソコンの電源を入れることです。

chunks.en: After that, I check my email and my chat.
chunks.ja: その後、メールとチャットを確認します。

chunks.en: I always say hello to my team members.
chunks.ja: 私はいつもチームのメンバーに挨拶します。

chunks.en: I also make a cup of coffee in the morning.
chunks.ja: 朝はコーヒーも一杯いれます。

chunks.en: In the morning, I feel a little sleepy but calm.
chunks.ja: 朝は少し眠いですが落ち着いた気分です。

chunks.en: After coffee, I feel ready to start my work.
chunks.ja: コーヒーを飲むと仕事を始める準備ができた気分になります。

outline: Point 1: first things at my desk
Wrap-up: how I feel in the morning

modelTalk.text: I usually get to work at nine. Sometimes I'm a little early. I take the train, and it's often full. When I arrive, I go to my desk first. I put my bag down. Then I turn on my computer. I check my email and my messages. I say hello to my coworkers. My friend Ken sits next to me. I say good morning to my boss too. In the morning, I'm a bit sleepy. So I make a coffee first. After that, I feel better and ready. I like the quiet time before work starts. It's a nice way to begin my day.

chunks.en: I usually arrive at work around nine.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい9時ごろに職場に着きます。

chunks.en: I usually take the train to the office.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい電車でオフィスに行きます。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is turn on my computer.
chunks.ja: 最初にすることはパソコンの電源を入れることです。

chunks.en: After that, I check my email and messages.
chunks.ja: そのあと、メールとメッセージを確認します。

chunks.en: I always say hello to my team members.
chunks.ja: 私はいつもチームのメンバーに挨拶します。

chunks.en: In the morning, I feel a little sleepy but calm.
chunks.ja: 朝は少し眠いですが、落ち着いた気分です。

chunks.en: After my coffee, I feel ready to start work.
chunks.ja: コーヒーを飲むと、仕事を始める準備ができた気分になります。

outline: Point 1: first thing at my desk
Point 2: who I greet and my routine
Wrap-up: how I feel in the morning

modelTalk.text: I usually get to work at nine. Sometimes I'm a little early. I take off my coat first. Then I sit down at my desk. I turn on my computer and I wait. It's a bit slow in the morning. I say hello to my boss. She's always kind to me. I say hi to my friend too. We talk about our weekend. I feel sleepy at first. But I drink some coffee and I feel better. The morning is quiet and calm. I like this time. Then I check my email. There are many new messages. I start my work slowly. I'm ready for the day now.
